text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 
405 
REDUCTED_COST_SHARE 

LABEL: 
Plan Offers Reduced Cost-Sharing 
DESCRIPTION: This variable indicates whether the plan offers reduced Part D cost-sharing as part of its supplemental 
Part D benefit. 
SHORT NAME: — 
LONG NAME: REDUCED_COST_SHARE 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
1 
SOURCE: 
CMS (HPMS Files) 
VALUES: 
Y = Yes 

N = No 

9 = Not applicable 

X = Unknown 

COMMENT: 
This
